occupation: Chief Operating Officer at Multiply Media Group
headline: COO | Leadership | Strategic | Management | Marketing | Media | Advertising
summary: Leadership is a life style not a job! +17 years of dynamic experience in management, media, and advertising accross multiple countries in the Gulf. I bring a wealth of knowledge and expertise in navigating the challenges of the Saudi market. Throughout my career, I have successfully led teams and executed strategic initiatives that drive growth and deliver impactful results. Passionate about leveraging the power of media and advertising to connect with audiences and drive business success, I thrive in fast-paced environments where innovation and creativity are paramount.

recommendations:
AbdulRahman Alzaid

I had the pleasure of working with Elie for over 7 years during my tenure at JCDecauxATA, and he was the consummate professional. He helped establish the company’s presence in Saudi Arabia, and managed to skillfully employ his sales expertise throughout the Kingdom; relocating from Khobar to Jeddah and then to Riyadh. In addition to having the rare ability to adapt perfectly well to change, he is also an overachiever with a great personality.

Daniel Sabanekh

It’s rare that you come across standout talent like Elie, 
With his new role @ jcdecaux people will have the opportunity to report to a real manager who is also a coach and mentor. 
I personally enjoyed working with Elie being our outdoor solution supplier. He comes across as a trusted partner & professional solutions provider to his clients all the time. 
Ridiculously efficient ... is the phrase that comes to mind when I think about Him 😂
